articles.title: Invoking faith in wartime, Pete Hegseth breaks norms and worries critics
articles.description:
On Wednesday at the Pentagon, Hegseth prayed for US troops to inflict “overwhelming violence of action against those who deserve no mercy … We ask these things with bold confidence in the mighty and powerful name of Jesus Christ.”

The post Invoking faith in wartime, Pete Hegseth breaks norms and worries critics appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Pete Hegseth prayed for US troops at the Pentagon on March 29, 2023.
His invocation of faith sparked criticism regarding military ethics and religious influence.
Boston residents may face debates on the intersection of faith and military actions.

articles.title: ‘Project Hail Mary’ flies to $54.5 million second weekend, horror reaches a saturation point
articles.description:
The Phil Lord and Chris Miller sci-fi adventure, starring Ryan Gosling, dipped only 32% after notching the best non-franchise opening weekend since 2023’s “Oppenheimer.”

The post ‘Project Hail Mary’ flies to $54.5 million second weekend, horror reaches a saturation point appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: ‘Project Hail Mary’ earned $54.5 million in its second weekend at Boston theaters.
Film dipped only 32% after a strong opening, outperforming other recent releases.
Local cinemas benefit from increased attendance amid horror genre saturation.
